summary: Completed all 6 tasks for Phase 1: Cross-Platform Source Fixes (A1-A4). All shell commands replaced with Node.js equivalents, path-utils handles Windows backslashes, chmodSync guarded on Windows.

completedTasks.commit: feat(scripts): add cross-platform clean.mjs to replace rm -rf
feat(cli): add cross-platform copy-assets.mjs to replace cp -r
refactor: replace shell commands in package.json scripts with Node.js equivalents
fix(eslint-plugin): handle Windows backslash separators in path-utils
fix(cli): guard chmodSync with platform check for Windows compatibility

completedTasks.description: Integration verification - all tests pass, build succeeds, lint clean

learnings: fs.cp with symlinks in agents/ directory causes ERR_FS_CP_EINVAL - must use dereference:false and filter out node_modules
lint-staged can sweep in unrelated file renames when committing, causing test breakage from partial migrations
pnpm run clean removes node_modules which breaks subsequent lint-staged hooks - reinstall needed before committing
